name: Apst I.D Lawon
about: Isaiah D. Lawon is the Founding President and General Missions Director of the Fullstature Missions International (FMI). He has a strong apostolic and prophetic dimension upon his ministry, having served the Lord faithfully in various capacities in the last 40 years, including as a former National Chair of the Nigeria Evangelical Missions Association (NEMA).

name: Rev. Peter Oyugi
about: Rev. Peter Oyugi is an international missions leader and mentor who serves as the Continental Coordinator for the Movement of African National Initiatives (MANI). Based in the UK, he actively coordinates cross-cultural evangelism and leadership networks across Africa and Europe, drawing on over two decades of student ministry and diaspora mobilization experience.

name: Pst. Olushola Gboyega
about: Gboyega Olusola is the President of Fullstature Missions International (FMI). He is a seasoned preacher of the Word of grace with clarity, insight, and signs and wonders attending to it, as well as a mobilizer of men and materials for missions recruiting and involvement.

name: Bishop Charles Cody
about: Bishop Charles Cody completed his PhD in 2000 and was consecrated as Bishop under the Trans-Atlantic & Pacific Alliance of Churches. He has ministered on the mission field in over 60 countries and is the co-founder and Senior Pastor of Word Alive Global Ministries in Orlando, FL.

name: Prof. Danny McCain
about: Danny McCain (BA, MA, MA, PhD) is a Professor of Biblical Theology who has served in UNIJOS since 1991, currently serving as Director of the Centre for Conflict Management and Peace Studies. He is also the founder of Global Scholars and chairman of Africa Christian Textbooks.

name: Dr. Kunle Ogunkolati
about: Dr. Kunle Ogunkolati is currently the Vice Chairman, Centre for Biblical Christianity in Africa, for Nigeria. He served as a pastor and church planter for more than 25 years at the Deeper Life Bible Church and currently pioneers Pentecostal City Mission in Lagos.

name: Dr. Isaac Apata
about: Revd. (Dr.) Isaac Apata is a missionary and evangelist by calling with a strong passion to win souls for Christ. He holds a Doctor of Divinity in Missions and Evangelism and serves as the International Director for The Soul Refreshers Foundation Inc.

name: Rev. Ezekiel Adegbite
about: Ezekiel A. Adegbite is the President and senior Pastor of Grace Abound Global Mission. He has an Apostolic calling that enables him to preach the gospel across the Nations, is a chartered accountant by profession, and serves as a director of Excel Professional Centre.

name: Pst. Sola Mene
about: Chris Sola Mene is a pastor, author, and teacher of God's word who oversees the vision of Petra Ministry International. He is the senior pastor of Dayspring Christian Centre, a church committed to raising a dynamic army for the Lord Jesus Christ.
